title: Macrothelypteris oligophlebia
taxonomy: Macrothelypteris oligophlebia is a species of fern in the family Thelypteridaceae. It belongs to the genus Macrothelypteris, which is part of the kingdom Plantae. The classification of Macrothelypteris oligophlebia is as follows: kingdom - Plantae, division - Pteridophyta, class - Polypodiopsida, order - Polypodiales, family - Thelypteridaceae, genus - Macrothelypteris, species - M. oligophlebia. The classification reflects its evolutionary relationships and characteristics as a member of the fern family. This classification system helps in understanding the diversity and distribution of Macrothelypteris oligophlebia and its relatives.
